name: hcportal_addEditEvent
description: Creates a new event or updates an existing event for a kennel. Handles event data (name, description, location, pricing, tags, dissemination settings), optionally saves tags as kennel defaults, and triggers run number recalculation inside the transaction. @publicEventId=NULL means insert; non-NULL means update. Renamed from HC5's hcportal_addEditEvent2. @deleted parameter removed — deletion is exclusively via hcportal_deleteEvent.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: identifies the calling user, validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. Declared nullable so validation errors are trapped in SQL rather than causing SP execution failure.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token, validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Required: identifies the kennel this event belongs to. Declared nullable for SQL-side validation. Auth is checked against this value.

parameters.name: absoluteEventNumber
parameters.description: Optional absolute event number. Sentinels: -1 normalised to NULL (no-op), -2 on insert sets to NULL. On update: value <= 0 sets to NULL.

parameters.name: eventImage
parameters.description: URL for the event image. Sentinel: '<null>' sets the column to NULL. Strings shorter than 3 chars (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: eventEndDatetime
parameters.description: Event end date/time. Values <= 1/1/2000 normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: eventDescription
parameters.description: Free-text event description. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL. Unicode paragraph separators (U+2028, U+2029) stripped.

parameters.name: eventGeographicScope
parameters.description: Geographic scope (1=Normal, 2=Local special, 3=Regional, 4=National, 5=Continental, 6=Global, 7=Other). Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Defaults to 1 on insert.

parameters.name: eventName
parameters.description: Event display name. Widened from NVARCHAR(120) in HC5 to match table column. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL. Auto-generated placeholder if blank on insert.

parameters.name: eventPriceForExtras
parameters.description: Price for extras/add-ons. Changed from FLOAT (HC5) to DECIMAL(10,4) to match table column. Sentinels: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets the column to NULL.

parameters.name: eventPriceForMembers
parameters.description: Event price for members. Changed from FLOAT (HC5) to DECIMAL(10,4) to match table column. Sentinels: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets the column to NULL.

parameters.name: eventPriceForNonMembers
parameters.description: Event price for non-members. Changed from FLOAT (HC5) to DECIMAL(10,4) to match table column. Sentinels: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets the column to NULL.

parameters.name: extrasDescription
parameters.description: Description of extras. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: extrasRsvpRequired
parameters.description: Whether RSVP is required for extras. Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: hares
parameters.description: Hare names. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: integrationEnabled
parameters.description: Whether external integration is enabled. Changed from SMALLINT (HC5) to INT to match table column. Defaults to 1 on update, 0 on insert.

parameters.name: isCountedRun
parameters.description: Whether this event counts toward run numbers. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Defaults to 1 on insert.

parameters.name: isPromotedEvent
parameters.description: Whether this is a promoted/featured event. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: isVisible
parameters.description: Whether this event is visible to users. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: hcLatitude
parameters.description: Event latitude. Sentinels: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -999.0 sets the column to NULL (sentinel changed from -99.0 in HC5). Also updates Event.EventGeolocation (geography::Point).

parameters.name: locationCity
parameters.description: City name. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: locationCountry
parameters.description: Country name. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: locationOneLineDesc
parameters.description: One-line location description. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL. Unicode paragraph separators stripped.

parameters.name: locationPostCode
parameters.description: Postal/zip code. Widened from NVARCHAR(50) in HC5 to match table column. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: locationRegion
parameters.description: Region/state. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: locationStreet
parameters.description: Street address. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: locationSubRegion
parameters.description: Sub-region/district. Sentinel: '<null>' sets column to NULL. Strings shorter than 1 char (LEN) normalised to NULL.

parameters.name: hcLongitude
parameters.description: Event longitude. Sentinels: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -999.0 sets the column to NULL. Also updates Event.EventGeolocation.

parameters.name: maximumParticipantsAllowed
parameters.description: Maximum participants cap. Sentinel: -2 sets column to NULL.

parameters.name: minimumParticipantsRequired
parameters.description: Minimum participants required. Sentinel: -2 sets column to NULL.

parameters.name: publicEventId
parameters.description: If provided, identifies an existing event to update (UPDATE path). If NULL, a new event is inserted (INSERT path). Generated internally on insert and returned in the success rowset.

parameters.name: saveTagsAsKennelDefault
parameters.description: If 1, saves the provided tags1/tags2/tags3 values as the kennel's DefaultRunTags1/2/3. Only updates if tags differ from current kennel defaults.

parameters.name: eventStartDatetime
parameters.description: Event start date/time. Values <= 1/1/2000 normalised to NULL. On insert: defaults to 3 days from now with kennel's DefaultRunStartTime applied if time is midnight or not provided.

parameters.name: tags1
parameters.description: Primary event tag bitfield. Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: tags2
parameters.description: Secondary event tag bitfield. Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: tags3
parameters.description: Tertiary event tag bitfield. Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbImage
parameters.description: Whether to use external (Facebook) image. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbLatLon
parameters.description: Whether to use external lat/lon. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbLocation
parameters.description: Whether to use external location. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbRunDetails
parameters.description: Whether to use external run details (name, start time, description). Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: canEditRunAttendence
parameters.description: Whether users can edit their own attendance. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets column to NULL.

parameters.name: evtDisseminationAudience
parameters.description: Event-level dissemination audience override. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets column to NULL.

parameters.name: evtDisseminateAllowWebLinks
parameters.description: Whether dissemination allows web links. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets column to NULL. Sentinel fixed from HC5 (was '2' in HC5, now correctly '-2').

parameters.name: evtDisseminateHashRunsDotOrg
parameters.description: Whether to disseminate to HashRuns.org. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets column to NULL.

parameters.name: evtDisseminateOnGlobalGoogleCalendar
parameters.description: Whether to publish to the global Google Calendar. Sentinel: -1 normalised to NULL (no change), -2 sets column to NULL.

parameters.name: countryId
parameters.description: Statistics country reference. Falls back to kennel's CountryId on insert if not provided.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned on successful insert or update. Single row.

columns.name: result
columns.description: Human-readable success message, e.g. 'Successfully updated KennelShortName run/event #123' or 'Run added to Harrier Central'

columns.name: resultCode
columns.description: 1 on successful insert or update; NULL if neither path was taken

columns.name: publicEventId
columns.description: The public event ID — the existing ID on update, or the newly generated ID on insert

sideEffects: UPDATE HC.Event when @publicEventId identifies an existing event
UPDATE HC.HasherEventMap.updatedAt for all attendees when @countryId changes on an existing event
INSERT HC.Event when creating a new event (@publicEventId is NULL)
EXEC HC.nonApi_updateRunNumbers inside transaction after insert or update
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning (e.g. -999.0 for geo null, -2 for numeric null, '<null>' for string null, -1 for no-change)
Never re-add @deleted parameter — deletion is exclusively via hcportal_deleteEvent
